name: Render Environment Variable Checklist

render_required_env_vars.DATABASE_URL: Supabase Postgres connection string - enter in Render only
render_required_env_vars.OPENAI_API_KEY: OpenAI key - enter in Render only
render_required_env_vars.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: Stripe secret key - enter in Render only
render_required_env_vars.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET: Stripe webhook secret - enter in Render only

render_optional_env_vars.SMTP_PASSWORD: Optional email provider password - enter in Render only
render_optional_env_vars.SHOPIFY_API_SECRET: Optional ecommerce integration secret - enter in Render only
render_optional_env_vars.META_ADS_ACCESS_TOKEN: Optional ad integration token - enter in Render only
render_optional_env_vars.TIKTOK_ADS_ACCESS_TOKEN: Optional ad integration token - enter in Render only
render_optional_env_vars.KLAVIYO_API_KEY: Optional email/SMS integration key - enter in Render only

forbidden_locations: Vercel frontend env vars for backend secrets
